custom_components.name: Clinical Journey Timeline
custom_components.purpose: Map the visitor journey from first contact to follow-up care in a way that reduces uncertainty.
tailwind_notes: Use a responsive grid for desktop and a stacked sequence for mobile
Show progression through consistent connectors or dividers
content_guidance: Keep each step explicit and operational
Avoid clinical promises or unsupported logistics claims
brand_notes: Useful when the brand promise depends on clarity, safety, and guided support
